news.title: MMRDA starts land acquisition for ‘Third Mumbai’; consent process from April 27
news.para: MMRDA has begun land acquisition for 'Third Mumbai,' the Karnala-Sai-Chirner New Town, spanning 124 villages in Raigad. Landowners can opt for monetary compensation or land-based returns, including a land pooling model. This initiative aims to boost regional economic growth and establish a major technology and infrastructure hub.

news.title: Over 900 acres of Mhada layouts will be redeveloped across Mumbai
news.para: Mhada is set to redevelop a dozen layouts spanning 923 acres, aiming to rehabilitate over 75,000 residents within 5-10 years. Key projects like Charkop and Gorai layouts will soon seek state cabinet approval. The initiative also includes slum rehabilitation and a push for rental housing under the state housing policy.

news.title: Bombay HC says Mhada could use unclaimed Patra Chawl flats for public housing
news.para: Bombay High Court has set a deadline of April 30, 2026, for Goregaon Siddharth Nagar Sahakari Griha Nirman Sanstha Limited society members to take possession of their tenements. If members fail to do so, the court will allow MHADA to utilize these flats for public housing. Rehabilitation buildings are ready for occupation.

news.title: Repair in 30 days, consumer panel tells Supertech after seepage in Greater Noida flat
news.para: A district consumer commission has found Supertech Limited guilty of deficiency in service for a flat in Ecovillage-2 that suffered from seepage and sewage problems. The builder was ordered to rectify the defects within 30 days and pay the owner Rs 4,000 for mental anguish and litigation costs.

news.title: NOC must for works within 20 meter radius of Pune metro tunnel
news.para: Maha Metro now requires builders and property owners to get a No Objection Certificate before starting any construction within 20 meters of Metro structures. This rule aims to protect the Metro's structural integrity. Failure to comply will result in legal action and financial penalties. The directive follows an incident where excavation damaged a Metro tunnel.

news.title: Mumbai: Four bidders in fray for BMC’s ₹1,348 crore Lower Parel plot
news.para: The BMC is nearing the appointment of a developer for a prime six-acre Lower Parel plot, valued at Rs 1,348 crore. Four major real estate players have submitted bids after the Supreme Court ruled in the BMC's favor, ending a long-standing dispute. The developer will be responsible for rehabilitating existing occupants on the 'as-is' basis.

news.title: Allahabad HC stays demolition of 48 properties in Auraiya, seeks state's response
news.para: The Allahabad High Court has put a stop to the anticipated demolition of 48 homes and businesses in Auraiya district, calling for a pause in the current state of affairs for these properties. A follow-up hearing is set for April 29, with the state government expected to provide its response within the week.

news.title: UK's Workspace warns of 'substantial' profit drop for FY27
news.para: Workspace, the flexible office provider, projects a sharp decrease in profits for fiscal year 2027 due to falling rental revenues and surging operational costs. Following this news, their stock saw a significant decline. In response, Workspace is revamping its business strategy to tackle these hurdles and enhance its financial results.

news.title: Vedanta's claim of being highest bidder 'false narrative', RP tells NCLAT in Jaypee Associates insolvency case
news.para: Senior Advocate Abhishek Manu Singhvi, appearing for the Resolution Professional (RP) of Jaypee Associates, on Friday told the National Company Law Appellate Tribunal (NCLAT) that a "false and sensational narrative" is being created around Vedanta's being the highest financial bidder in the insolvency resolution process.

news.title: MDDA rejects commercial project near IMA-Dehradun over security clearance lapse
news.para: The Mussoorie Dehradun Development Authority has turned down a construction permit for a commercial project adjacent to the Indian Military Academy, citing serious security risks. The Indian Army expressed concerns as the developer neglected to secure a no-objection certificate from the IMA, which is essential when working in such a sensitive area.

news.title: Adani to get 17 lakh sq meters in Motilal Nagar project for sale; invest ₹1 lakh crore
news.para: Gautam Adani's group will redevelop Motilal Nagar in Goregaon. The project spans 143 acres and involves a Rs 1 lakh crore investment. Adani's firm receives 17 lakh sq meters for sale. Original residents will be rehabilited. This is the first project under the CD&A model. MHADA retains land ownership.

news.title: UltraTech Cement crosses 200 MTPA domestic capacity with 8.7 MTPA addition
news.para: UltraTech Cement has commissioned three new grinding units with a combined capacity of 8.7 MTPA, taking its domestic cement capacity to 200.1 MTPA. The company is targeting 240 MTPA capacity with ongoing expansion projects backed by ₹16,000 crore capex.

news.title: UP-RERA cautions buyers against ‘assured returns’ schemes, flags misleading real estate ads
news.para: UP-RERA has warned homebuyers against investing based on offers such as assured returns, pre-EMI schemes and fixed rental income, stating such promises lack legal validity unless included in RERA-approved agreements. The authority said strict action will be taken against misleading advertisements.

news.title: Halt operation if clearance missing: NGT orders HSPCB checks on Rewari brick kiln
news.para: The National Green Tribunal has ordered the Haryana Pollution Control Board to shut down a brick kiln in Rewari within a week if it lacks a valid Consent to Operate. This directive follows allegations that the unit flouted environmental norms and continued operating despite a district closure order and cancellation of its consent.

news.title: Aditya Birla Housing Finance allots shares worth ₹2,750 crore to Indriya
news.para: Aditya Birla Housing Finance has raised about ₹2,750 crore through a preferential allotment to Indriya, an Advent International entity. Following the transaction, the investor will hold a 14.29% stake, reducing Aditya Birla Capital’s holding to 85.5%.

news.title: NDR InvIT acquires two warehousing assets in Kochi & Coimbatore for ₹260 crore
news.para: NDR InvIT Trust has broadened its horizons by acquiring two functional warehousing facilities located in Kochi and Coimbatore for an impressive ₹260 crore. This strategic acquisition contributes an additional 0.79 million sq ft of leasable area to their already robust portfolio. With this enhancement, the Trust’s overall operating space reaches a commendable 22.

news.title: Army flags security concerns over mall near IMA in Dehradun, permission for project scrapped
news.para: The Indian Army has raised objections to a private builder's plan for a shopping mall near the Indian Military Academy in Dehradun. The Army cited security risks and violations of construction norms. Authorities have now rejected the builder's application. The builder claims they followed all procedures and sought necessary approvals.

news.title: Shree Cement, Ansal Housing receive tax demands; Kesoram’s liability reduced to ₹6 crore
news.para: Shree Cement and Ansal Housing have received tax demand orders from GST and Income Tax authorities, respectively, while Kesoram Industries said its earlier tax demand has been significantly reduced. All three companies plan to challenge the orders and said there is no material impact on operations.

news.title: NBCC sells commercial space worth ₹5,779 crore at Sarojini Nagar project
news.para: NBCC has completed an e-auction for commercial space at Bharat Business Park in Sarojini Nagar, New Delhi. The auction generated a significant ₹5,779 crore. This sale will fund ongoing redevelopment projects and meet financial commitments. The average sale rate saw a notable increase over the reserve price.

news.title: Telangana RERA launches public grievance, guidance cell to strengthen stakeholder facilitation
news.para: Telangana RERA has introduced an innovative Public Grievance and Guidance Cell, transforming the way residents interact with the real estate landscape. This new platform serves as a beacon of support, offering clear insights into the entitlements and obligations of both buyers and sellers.
